user_system_path: Master Audit #445, Pass 1 (Security & multi-tenant isolation). Verdict PASS: proved read-only that all 26 tables are RLS-enabled, every tenant policy is scoped by auth.uid(), internal tables are restrictive-deny, the service-role key is server-only, and connector tokens are encrypted at rest. Closed the one CONCERN (no regression guard) by shipping tests/security/__tests__/rls-isolation.test.ts (6 invariants over a committed live-policy snapshot) + docs/security/RLS_ISOLATION.md. Owner-side: enable Supabase leaked-password protection + more MFA (advisor WARN, #420 Tier 3). Tests + docs + control-plane only; no product/runtime/schema/deps changes. Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Pass 0 is a read-only inventory + control-plane roll: only docs/** and the control-plane files may change.
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes in Pass 0 — findings are logged in #445 and routed to later passes.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run tests/security/__tests__/rls-isolation.test.ts
required_browser_proof: N/A — security audit + deterministic test, no user-facing surface changed.
acceptance_condition: Every user-data table's RLS isolation is proven (recorded in docs/security/RLS_ISOLATION.md), the cross-tenant isolation contract test passes (tests/security/__tests__/rls-isolation.test.ts, 6/6 green), findings logged in #445, the control plane names #445 consistently, and gate:continuity passes.
anti_regression_checks: no product/runtime/schema/deps files changed (tests + docs only)
stop_condition: Stop when Pass 1 is merged, the Pass 1 box is checked in #445, and the next seam (Pass 3 Cost) is named.
next_command: Start Pass 3 (Cost & unit economics) as its own seam -> PR: execute docs/COST_AND_ECONOMICS_AUDIT.md. Owner-side unlock: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in Vercel Production; enable Supabase leaked-password protection + MFA.
